summary: COMPARISON: LEFT 1D walk on number line with always_redraw BLUE dot + live return count (recurrent). RIGHT axes of distance from origin over time for a precomputed 3D walk with ORANGE trail + rider dot + √t reference curve (transient). ValueTracker t_tr advances precomputed 400-step walks in lockstep; live panel shows both positions, return counts, and Pólya's theorem facts.
